betaBanner.lead: HairAudit is currently in public beta.
betaBanner.detail: All audits are free while we refine the Follicle Intelligence™ scoring system. AI scoring is monitored and manually corrected when required. Clinics and doctors participating in beta receive free access and early ranking placement.

footer.brandBlurb: Independent, evidence-based forensic audits of hair transplant procedures.
footer.tagline: HairAudit — Audit and feedback for hair transplant procedures
footer.ecosystemBandTitle: Part of the Surgical Intelligence Ecosystem™
footer.crossPlatformHairAuditMessage: HairAudit is powered by the Follicle Intelligence engine.
footer.crossPlatformFiMessage: HairAudit is the first application powered by Follicle Intelligence.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your HairAudit account. Patient, doctor, and clinic experiences are all in beta testing.
login.footerRedirect: By signing in, you’ll be redirected to your role-based dashboard.

signup.subtitle: Choose your path: Patient, Clinic, or Doctor. Each has a tailored experience.
signup.rolePatientDesc: Submit transplant cases for independent forensic review.
signup.roleClinicDesc: Create your free clinic profile, submit audited cases, and build a verified public presence over time.
signup.roleDoctorDesc: Create your free doctor profile and begin building a transparent, evidence-based professional record.

betaAccess.title: Beta Access Notice
betaAccess.body1: HairAudit beta currently supports patient, doctor, and clinic experiences (for example Invited Contributions and Submitted Cases for clinics).
betaAccess.body2: If you are seeing this page, your current account role is not yet enabled for the active beta access list.
betaAccess.body3: Sign in with an approved Patient, Doctor, or Clinic beta account to continue.

home.title: HairAudit | Independent Hair Transplant Audits & Reviews
home.description: HairAudit delivers independent, evidence-based hair transplant audits—forensic review of donor area, growth, density, design, and technique without clinic marketing. Explore methodology and patient guides on the site; use Request a review when you are ready to submit photos for a structured report.

howItWorks.title: How Hair Transplant Audits Work | Process & Evidence | HairAudit
howItWorks.description: How HairAudit delivers independent hair transplant reviews: secure photo intake, structured forensic assessment, confidence-aware reporting, and clear next steps—without clinic marketing.

professionals.title: For Professionals | Independent Hair Transplant Audit Standards | HairAudit
professionals.description: Methodology, scoring, evidence standards, and participation frameworks for clinics and professionals seeking transparency, QA, and benchmarking—aligned to HairAudit’s independent forensic audit model.

sampleReport.title: Sample Hair Transplant Audit Report | HairAudit
sampleReport.description: Proof of HairAudit report output: scorecard by domain, donor and recipient analysis, technique and design notes, confidence limits, and plain-language next steps—marketing walkthrough of example content; submit your own case via Request a review.

shared.reviewAfterSubmitLi1: - We check your photos and timeline for completeness.
shared.reviewAfterSubmitLi2: - AI analysis prepares an evidence map for medical review.
shared.reviewAfterSubmitLi3: - A clinical reviewer verifies findings before your report is released.
shared.reviewAfterSubmitLi4: - You receive clear next-step guidance in plain language.
shared.reviewIndependentNote: HairAudit is independent. We do not sell surgery or clinic referrals.

home.heroLead: Evidence-based forensic audit of your result—donor area, growth, density, hairline design, implantation, and technique—with clear, structured reporting.
home.heroSupporting: AI-assisted analysis within an independent review framework. Not a clinic sales pitch—transparency you can use for decisions and follow-up with your clinician.
home.heroFootnote: Used by trichologists, surgeons, and global training academies
home.howStep1Desc: Securely upload images of your donor and recipient areas. Takes less than 2 minutes.
home.howStep2Desc: AI-assisted image and evidence mapping supports an independent clinical review of extraction quality, density, donor management, and surgical technique.
home.howStep3Desc: Get your HairAudit Score, visual breakdown, and clear next-step recommendations.
home.ecosystemHeading: Part of the Global Hair Intelligence Network
home.ecosystemDescription: HairAudit sits within a connected global system linking hair biology, treatment planning, surgical transparency, and AI-driven analysis.
home.wygScoreDesc: A clear rating of your surgical outcome based on clinical standards.
home.wygDonorDesc: Assessment of extraction pattern, overharvesting risk, and donor preservation.
home.wygDensityDesc: Evaluation of graft placement, spacing, and naturalness.
home.wygTechniqueDesc: Identification of technique quality and potential red flags.
home.wygRecoDesc: Clear guidance on next steps, improvements, or corrective options.
home.sampleTeaserTitle: See What Your Results Could Reveal
home.sampleTeaserLead: Every HairAudit report provides a clear, visual breakdown of your surgery — showing what was done well and what may need attention.
home.sampleTeaserLi4: Clear clinical explanation — no confusing terminology
home.seoResourcesIntro: Explore methodology, patient guides, and common questions—then request a review when you are ready.
home.seoResourcesGraftFailure: Signs of graft failure vs shock loss
home.whyMattersP1: Results are often judged by appearance alone — but what looks acceptable can hide poor technique. HairAudit assesses what most patients cannot see: how grafts were extracted, how the donor was managed, and whether the work meets real clinical standards.
home.whyMattersP2: Not a sales tool. Independent verification of your results.
home.whoFor1: Patients who want to understand the true quality of their hair transplant
home.whoFor2: Anyone considering surgery and wanting to avoid poor outcomes
home.whoFor3: Patients who have had a transplant and are unsure about their results
home.whoFor4: Clinics and doctors who want independent validation of their work
home.privacyBody: All uploads are securely stored and handled with strict privacy controls. Your data is never shared without your consent.
home.finalCtaTitle: Get Clarity on Your Hair Transplant
home.finalCtaSubtitle: Understand your results. Identify risks. Make informed decisions.
home.certifiedSubtitle: Sample recognition certificates across tiers. Click to view the printable certificate.

patientReportValue.headline: Independent audit. Clear patient guidance.
patientReportValue.lead: HairAudit stays an independent, evidence-based forensic audit. Patient reports now pair those findings with patient-friendly interpretation and long-term orientation—always distinct from clinic marketing or surgeon benchmarking.
patientReportValue.bullet1: Independent findings grounded in your images, timeline, and scoring criteria.
patientReportValue.bullet2: Plain-language interpretation of what the evidence supports, where confidence is limited, and why it matters.
patientReportValue.bullet3: Long-term guidance oriented to native hair health and donor protection in the context of your audit—not generic aftercare filler.
patientReportValue.bullet4: What to monitor over time so changes are noticed early and discussed appropriately with your clinician.
patientReportValue.feature1Desc: Structured conclusions tied to visible evidence and audit standards—separate from any treating clinic’s narrative.
patientReportValue.feature2Desc: Medically informed language with explicit limits: what is demonstrated, what is uncertain, and what would require additional data.
patientReportValue.feature3Desc: Durable orientation to safeguarding native density and donor reserve after surgery, framed to your case—not a one-size checklist.
patientReportValue.feature4Desc: Time-based cues for stability, regression signals, and documentation that supports informed follow-up with your medical team.
patientReportValue.guideEyebrow: Not ready for a full audit?
patientReportValue.guideTitle: Submit your free audit to unlock the Post-Operative Hair Protection Guide
patientReportValue.guideBody: A practical educational guide from Hair Longevity Institute for patients who want structured post-surgical orientation, long-term hair protection guidance, and a clearer understanding of what to monitor over time.
patientReportValue.guideSupportingLine: The guide becomes available after you submit your audit.
patientReportValue.guideFootnote: Hair Longevity Institute provides the educational guide. HairAudit remains the independent audit platform. Guide content does not influence audit findings, scoring, or review outcomes.

howItWorks.heroSubtitle: We use your photos and case details to build a clear, independent review.
howItWorks.afterSubmitNote: Many patients only realise something may be wrong months after surgery. HairAudit helps you understand whether your result is normal — or if something went wrong.
howItWorks.flowStep3: A medical expert reviews the case
howItWorks.afterBody: Your report explains what looks well supported, where confidence is limited, and what next steps may help.
howItWorks.closingTitle: Move from uncertainty to structured evidence
howItWorks.closingSubtitle: Choose the next entry point based on what you need now.

professionals.pageIntro: HairAudit combines structured image review, scoring logic, evidence standards, and expert interpretation to assess hair transplant outcomes with consistency and clarity.
professionals.cardApplyDesc: Create a free clinic or doctor profile and begin with internal audits or build your verified professional presence.
professionals.cardMethodologyDesc: Structured review model, evidence weighting logic, and standardized assessment principles.
professionals.cardScoringDesc: Domain definitions, dual patient/technical explanations, and scoring clarity.
professionals.cardEvidenceDesc: Image requirements, sufficiency criteria, confidence grading, and limitations.
professionals.cardParticipationDesc: Voluntary participation pathways and quality-improvement context for clinics.
professionals.cardLegalDesc: Objective documentation principles for dispute clarification and structured review.
professionals.cardAuditorDesc: Reviewer qualifications, consistency controls, and oversight processes.

sampleReport.heroTitle: See What a Real HairAudit Report Looks Like
sampleReport.heroSubtitle: This is a structured, independent review of hair transplant quality. Every conclusion is tied to visible evidence, scoring criteria, and confidence limits so patients can make high-stakes decisions with clarity.
sampleReport.heroNote: Premium report format. Redacted sample content. No private patient data.
sampleReport.midBannerBody: Need clarity before corrective surgery or a formal complaint? Use an evidence-first audit.
sampleReport.cardOverviewDetail: Weighted scoring for planning, execution, design quality, and evidence integrity with clear confidence notes.
sampleReport.cardRadarDetail: A domain-by-domain radar profile to reveal strengths and quality gaps in one clinical visual.
sampleReport.cardImageDetail: Annotated scalp, hairline, and donor imagery with density zones, extraction patterns, and risk markers.
sampleReport.cardFindingsDetail: Structured conclusions and realistic next-step actions patients can use for follow-up, repair planning, or dispute documentation.
sampleReport.chartRadarDesc: Performance domains mapped across design, density, execution, and donor safety.
sampleReport.chartBreakdownDesc: Weighted bar chart aligned to report scoring categories.
sampleReport.meterDesc: Separates quality concerns from evidence limitations.
sampleReport.correctionVisDesc: Prioritization grid for what to address first.
sampleReport.motivation1: My result looks disappointing and I need a professional, independent quality review.
sampleReport.motivation2: I am concerned the graft count or achieved density does not match what was promised.
sampleReport.motivation3: I want an objective second opinion before committing to corrective surgery.
sampleReport.motivation4: I need structured documentation before a repair consult, complaint, or dispute.
sampleReport.footerTitle: See What Your Surgery Really Shows
sampleReport.footerBody: Move from uncertainty to structured evidence. Receive a premium independent report you can use for planning, consultations, and documentation.
sampleReport.correctionImmediateBody: Donor over-harvest risk and asymmetrical frontal density.
sampleReport.correctionNextBody: Hairline irregularity refinement and zone-specific planning.
sampleReport.correctionDocBody: Collect standardized images and operative records before any corrective commitments.
sampleReport.patientGuidanceLead: Alongside the independent forensic audit, you receive:
sampleReport.patientGuidanceLi1: Long-term preservation guidance for native hair, in context of your evidence and findings
sampleReport.patientGuidanceLi2: Donor protection education aligned with what the audit documents—not promotional reassurance
sampleReport.patientGuidanceLi3: Time-based monitoring advice to support follow-up conversations with your clinician

chrome.scoreByAreaSubtitle: Your score for each capture point (out of 5, with level)

demo.title: HairAudit Sample Report
demo.lead: See the structure and depth of a full HairAudit AI surgical analysis. This sample uses illustrative data only; real reports are generated from your submitted case evidence.
demo.nextStepsTitle: Request an Audit · Book a Demo · Create a Clinic Profile
demo.nextStepsBody: Get a full report for your case, see the platform for your clinic, or join the HairAudit network.

html.footerLine1: HairAudit — advancing transparency in hair restoration.
html.footerLine2: This report is informational and not a medical diagnosis.

actions.noReportYet: No report yet. Run audit to generate one.
actions.useHintContext: This report can support consultation or follow-up decisions.

patient.heroSubtitle: Complete your intelligence inputs to unlock full forensic analysis.
patient.conversionPrompt: Complete your final inputs to increase audit precision by up to 35%.

nextAction.processingBody: We are processing your audit. You will be notified when your report is ready.
nextAction.failedTitle: We were unable to complete this audit
nextAction.failedBody: Please contact support or try resubmitting your case materials.

safeSummary.title: Patient-safe summary
safeSummary.subtitle: Localized framing is shown here. Generated clinical observation text remains in English for now.
safeSummary.subtitleTranslated: Localized framing is shown here. This case is using the Spanish patient-safe summary translation pilot while English remains the source record.
safeSummary.subtitleTranslationUnavailable: Localized framing is shown here. The English source summary is currently shown because translated summary availability can vary by case and review status.
safeSummary.observationsHint: These items come from the current report summary, but only the shell labels are translated in this phase.
safeSummary.observationsHintTranslated: These items come from the current report summary and are being shown through the bounded Spanish patient-safe summary translation pilot.
safeSummary.observationsHintTranslationUnavailable: These items come from the report summary and are currently shown from the English source version.
safeSummary.noObservations: No structured summary observations are available yet for this case.
safeSummary.disclaimer: This summary shell is localized for easier navigation. Generated narrative, findings, and recommendations are still shown in their original English output.
safeSummary.disclaimerTranslated: Spanish translated summary text is shown only for this patient-safe pilot surface. The English source summary remains authoritative, and the full report is unchanged.
safeSummary.disclaimerTranslationUnavailable: When a translated summary is not currently available, we show the English source summary so your case information remains consistent.
safeSummary.actionPrompt: Use the report actions on this page to open or download the full report.

This will remove its answers, photos, and saved progress.
deleteDraft.confirmUnnamed:
Delete this draft audit?

This will remove its answers, photos, and saved progress.

completion.title: Case Completion
completion.subtitle: Based on photos + procedure + handling + healing inputs.

hliGuide.bodyLocked: Submit your free audit to access the Post-Operative Hair Protection Guide from Hair Longevity Institute.
hliGuide.bodyUnlocked: Your audit has been submitted. You can now download the Post-Operative Hair Protection Guide from Hair Longevity Institute.
hliGuide.successLine: Your submission unlocked this educational resource.
hliGuide.hliAttribution: Guide authored by Hair Longevity Institute (HLI) for patient education.
hliGuide.boundaryNote: HairAudit runs your independent audit and review. HLI provides the guide only; it does not change audit findings.

unlock.sectionSubtitle: Your inputs activate deeper models—each layer increases audit precision.
unlock.radarDesc: A multi-factor performance imprint synthesized from photos + procedure signals.
unlock.donorDesc: Risk calibration for extraction density, pattern, and long-term donor integrity.
unlock.viabilityDesc: Viability inference from handling signals—hydration, storage, time, and exposure.
unlock.aestheticDesc: Aesthetic consistency scoring across hairline, directionality, and symmetry signals.
unlock.timelineDesc: Stage-aware projection of growth and density maturation based on healing inputs.

whyMatters.title: Why this matters
whyMatters.subtitle: Better inputs mean higher-confidence conclusions.
whyMatters.donorRiskDesc: Improves donor safety inference and extraction-pattern interpretation.
whyMatters.survivalDesc: Transforms handling details into a viability confidence profile.
whyMatters.projectionDesc: Sharpens growth-stage interpretation and forecasted outcome stability.

caseHistory.title: My audit requests
caseHistory.subtitle: Your cases and audit status history.
caseHistory.empty: No cases yet. Create your first one to activate the dashboard.

graftIntegrity.rolloutBody: This feature is rolling out in your environment. Check back soon.
graftIntegrity.title: Graft Integrity Index™
graftIntegrity.subtitle: Claimed vs visually supportable graft ranges (probabilistic).
graftIntegrity.aiDisclaimer: This is an AI-based visual density estimate and not a definitive graft count.
graftIntegrity.evidenceLimited: Evidence is currently limited. Adding clearer donor/recipient photos helps narrow the range.
graftIntegrity.emptyState: No estimate is available yet for your latest submitted case. Once enough donor/recipient photos are available, the system will generate a conservative range with explicit limitations.
graftIntegrity.pendingReview: Your estimate is being prepared and reviewed. You’ll see audited ranges once review is complete.
graftIntegrity.needsEvidenceBody: Upload clearer donor/recipient photos to narrow the range and increase confidence.

questionsPage.title: Intelligence Questions
questionsPage.subtitle: These inputs unlock deeper forensic analysis across donor safety, graft viability, healing course, and aesthetic balance.

intake.introLine: About 5–6 minutes. Complete your intelligence inputs to unlock deeper forensic analysis.
intake.advancedBody: Adds deeper inputs for graft viability, donor risk, healing stage, and aesthetic consistency. You can skip anytime.
intake.lockedBanner: Case submitted. Intelligence inputs are locked.
intake.photosSectionBody: Pre-procedure, surgery, and post-procedure images go in the next step.

reviewSummary.title: Review Summary
reviewSummary.hint: Review your answers below. Use the step dots above to edit.

adv_basics.title: Basics
adv_basics.description: Optional. Helps the AI model contextualize risk and healing stage.

adv_hair_biology.title: Hair & Biology
adv_hair_biology.description: Optional. Improves progression and donor-risk inference.

adv_procedure_details.title: Procedure Details
adv_procedure_details.description: Optional. Improves technician-role and planning inference.

adv_graft_handling.title: Graft Handling
adv_graft_handling.description: Optional. Strongly improves desiccation and viability inference.

adv_healing.title: Healing
adv_healing.description: Optional. Improves stage inference and complication risk framing.

adv_current_status.title: Current Status
adv_current_status.description: Optional. Improves aesthetic consistency + patient experience context.

procedure_type.help: Choose what you were told; 'Not Sure' is okay.

doctor.workspaceSubtitle: Complete the surgery form and upload photos per case. Each case uses the same audit flow: form → photos → submit.
doctor.noCasesBody: Begin building your verified professional profile by contributing your first case.
doctor.profileActiveTitle: Your doctor profile is now active.
doctor.profileActiveBody: You can begin building your verified record.
doctor.onboardingPageSubtitle: Set up your professional profile so we can attribute your cases and build your transparent record.
doctor.onboardingSubmitCta: Open case and submit for audit
doctor.checklistSubtitle: Follow these steps to complete your first case and contribute to transparent benchmarking.
doctor.whyMattersBody: Participation in HairAudit helps benchmark outcomes and improve transparency. Your documented cases contribute to evidence-based recognition and help set clearer expectations for patients and peers.

publicProfile.title: Public profile settings
publicProfile.description: Profile and visibility settings for how you appear on leaderboards and in the directory are coming soon. Your submitted cases already contribute to benchmarking.

training.title: Training portal
training.description: Targeted modules to improve documentation and audit readiness are planned. For now, use the audit feedback on each case report to strengthen your submissions.

defaults.title: Surgical defaults
defaults.description: Saving default answers (e.g. extraction method, holding solution) to reuse across cases is planned. For now, set values per case on each case’s doctor form.

reports.title: Audit reports hub
reports.description: A single place to see all your audit reports and pending actions is coming soon. For now, open any case from your overview to view its report and resolve feedback.

upload.title: Bulk upload
upload.description: A dedicated upload wizard for adding multiple cases in one flow is planned. For now, create cases from your overview and complete the form and photos for each case.

forms.onboardingLead: A minimal profile helps attribute your cases and build your public record.
forms.afterSaveHint: After saving, you can create your first audit case from the doctor overview and start building your evidence-based record.
forms.goToOverviewCreate: Go to overview and create a case →

page.title: Surgery Submission / Case Audit
page.description: Target 6–8 minutes. Complete as the treating physician.

clinic.noCasesBody: Start your first internal audit to begin building your clinic profile.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Portal configuration and default operational controls.
settings.recommendation: Settings will support role permissions, default visibility behavior, and white-label mode controls. You can already control case-level visibility from Invited Contributions.

benchmarking.title: Benchmarking
benchmarking.subtitle: Clinic and doctor benchmarking intelligence.
benchmarking.recommendation: This area will expose benchmark segments, confidence gating, and trend intelligence. Until this module is live, use the clinic leaderboard and Invited Contributions / Submitted Cases to monitor readiness.

training.subtitle: Internal QA and training intelligence modules.
training.recommendation: This module will become your clinic's training hub, combining case intelligence, protocol adherence, and repeatable quality playbooks.
